subcodes.first_line: O grief-stricken and heart-scorched soul! I read the letter announcing Ardishír's passing, and a thousand lamentations passed my lips [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ماتم زده دل سوخته وفات نامه اردشیر خواندم و هزار افسوس بر زبان راندم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @eulogies; reminiscences, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
